title: Molten Vestibule
body: Heat shimmers across sigils carved in bronze.

title: Prismatic Threshold
body: The floor arranges itself into impossible geometry.

title: Cinder Wardens
body: Ash-clad sentries rise with ember spears.

title: Sulfur Flood
body: A pressurized vent blasts toxic vapor.

title: The Nine Braziers
body: Only one sequence keeps the bridge from collapsing.

title: Pilgrim Alcove
body: Old prayer-candles still burn in this pocket of calm.

title: Reliquary Niche
body: A cracked chest hums with latent relic-magic.

title: The Ash Regent
body: An ancient warlord forged from charcoal armor blocks your path.

title: Refraction Drakes
body: Glass-scaled drakes split into mirrored afterimages.

title: Vacuum Choir
body: Silence itself pulls breath from your lungs.

title: Orrery Locks
body: Planets click in and out of phase with each mistake.

title: Starlit Cistern
body: Cool astral water steadies your pulse.

title: Zenith Cache
body: A mirrored casket waits beneath drifting dust.

title: The Wellsong Seraph
body: A winged construct chants equations that tear reality.

title: Sealed Egress
body: The path home opens as the chamber stills.
